instruction: Open Contacts and add a new contact named {NAME}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads contact names via AppleScript; the no-op adds no contact so the substring check scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Contacts"' -e 'make new person with properties {first name:"{NAME}"}' -e 'save' -e 'end tell' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Contacts" to get name of every person as string
